title: LHP UC Tags File
description: External Unity Catalog tags sidecar referenced by a write target's tags_file. Strict format: version + table required, plus tags (table-level) and/or column_tags (column-level).

table.description: The write target's table name (post-substitution). Must equal the write target's 'table'.

tags.description: Table-level tags. An explicit empty mapping means 'managed with an empty set' under remove_undeclared_tags.

column_tags.description: Column-level tags: a list of {name, tags} entries.

tags.description: This column's tags (may be empty). '' or ~ is a key-only tag.
